name: cloudops_orchestrator_agent
description: Orchestrates infrastructure and operations workflows, delegates to cloudops and devops agents
welcomeMessage:
👋 CloudOps orchestrator ready!

I can help you:
  • Plan infrastructure and size environments
  • Define configuration management strategies
  • Write RCA/post-mortem documents
  • Design CI/CD pipelines and DevOps strategy

Try: "Assess infrastructure impact of adding Redis caching"

agentSpawn.description: Inject available agents registry for dynamic delegation
Generate delegation map for routing decisions
